_publications._publicationTitle: Multidimensional Immunotyping of Human NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors Uncovers Tumor-Associated Macrophages as Key Drivers of Immune Evasion in the Tumor Microenvironment.

_contextSnippet: Similarly, nearly 4% of CD4+PD-1+ T cells in each sample expressed TSLPR or CX3CR1, with a higher proportion expressing CCR4, a less specific Th2 marker
details: Successfully detected Th2-associated surface marker on CD4+PD-1+ T cells; higher proportion of cells expressed CCR4 compared to other Th2 markers
